title: WEFT Pattern — Stash2Go Profile
description: Stash2Go profile of Pattern. Extends the base Pattern schema with Ravelry pattern linking, PDF library status, and download tracking.

stash2go.description: Stash2Go-specific fields that extend the generic WEFT Pattern.

ravelry_pattern_id.description: Ravelry numeric pattern ID (for API calls).

pdf_in_library.description: Whether the user has a PDF for this pattern in their Stash2Go library.

private_pdf_id.description: Stash2Go private PDF entity ID if the user has uploaded/linked a PDF.

download_status.description: Current download state of the pattern PDF.

downloaded_at.description: When the PDF was last downloaded.

ravelry_permalink.description: Ravelry URL-safe permalink for this pattern.
